# Inkwell

> Free, private AI resume builder. Editorial-grade templates, ATS-safe output, no signup required.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, and FAQ.
- [Builder](/builder): Step-by-step resume composer with live preview and PDF export.
- [Templates](/templates): Gallery of ATS-tested resume designs across Classic, Modern, Creative, Technical, and Academic categories.
- [Tools](/tools): ATS audit, job-description tailoring, cover letter generator, and JSON import/export.
